# Alley Admin

> Professional bowling league management software for bowling alleys, league coordinators, and tournament organizers.

## About

Alley Admin is a web-based application for managing bowling leagues — handling teams, schedules, score tracking, handicap calculations, standings, and tournament brackets.

## Status

Coming soon. Join the waitlist at https://alley-admin.com/

## Developer

Built by Jason Shprintz — https://jasonshprintz.com
